spec.vision: A performant, modular browser-based 3D Cyberpunk Marble-Physics game. Features a deterministic 60Hz physics accumulator loop running in WebAssembly (via Rapier3D) decoupled from the WebGL rendering loop. Rendered using Three.js with position interpolation (residual accumulator alpha) for ultra-smooth motion. Incorporates dynamic tilt controls (WASD, mouse, and accelerometer) mapping to shifting gravity vectors, neon track segments rendered using InstancedMesh, and custom distance-modulated PBR and glow vertex/fragment shaders.
